title: Greenhouse Coupling Tensor: Fewest Actuator Gadgets
strategies: trivial: one gadget per non-zero frontal (mode-3) fiber (matches the checker baseline B)
greedy: cheapest of the three fiber decompositions (fewest non-zero fibers over a mode)
strong: exact slice-rank (column-space) factorization along the best of 3 orientations; beats fibers but not the unknown optimum
open: search below the slice-rank bound -- the asymmetric Tucker core is over-complete, so the true minimum rank is genuinely unknown
